title: Attention All Poopers!!
description:
This is a poop of an anti-drug commercial that I transformed into an anti-mamaluigi commercial. The girl featured in this video is hilarious. If you use Mama Luigi in your poops, you may find your house under the very same punishment!

Disclaimer: I do not have anything personal against mama luigi. Its more than likely that i'll use the clip too, eventually. This is just a joke, don't take it seriously people. :P
